response.step_by_step_log: Identified the final song as 'Odyssey' by Hololive English by searching the lyrics 'Goodbye leaving heartbreak of the past behind'. Confirmed it is an English song. The background music in the skits was determined to be instrumental.
response.global_summary: The video is a 3D showcase for the VTuber Gigi Murin, featuring various comedic skits and concluding with the song 'Odyssey' by Hololive English.

scenes.description: The final song 'Odyssey' begins to play over a wide shot of a 3D animated village.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Goodbye,
leaving heartbreak of the past behind
there's no more turning back
It's time, 
moving down our own paths
Evermore voyaging forward to make this journey last.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Goodbye,
leaving heartbreak of the past behind
there's no more turning back
It's time, 
moving down our own paths
Evermore voyaging forward to make this journey last.

scenes.description: Skits with dialogue, with some light background instrumental music.
